chapter.label: Tale 99
chapter.title: The Life Of Anthony, An Elder At The

paragraphs.text: The fathers of the same monastery tod us that in former times there was an elder Jiving there named Ianthos. He spent his whole life going off to Coutila.* Once while he was in the wilderness some i Saracens came into those parts. When they saw (le elder, one of them drew his sword and approached him, intending to kill him, When the elder saw the Saracen coming towards him, he raised his eyes to heaven and said: ‘Lord Jesus Christ, thy will be done’.
Immediately Lhe earth opened and swallowed up the Saracen. The monk was saved and he went into the monastery, glorifying God.
